claim: EXPLORATORY-CONJECTURE (PINNED) — Conjecture 1: conservation as a bubble-local symmetry (Section 2 Part 1). IF energy conservation is the shadow of our universe's (the bubble's) time-translation symmetry (Noether) and the embedding meta-structure has no such symmetry, THEN total energy is undefined across the bubble boundary and energy need not be conserved there. Supporting crack: GR has no global energy conservation without a timelike Killing vector and our expanding universe has none (companion dossier). COST: strains global energy conservation; requires an embedding meta-structure + a small-but-finite boundary coupling Gamma (always-open floods, exactly-zero seals). OPEN HOLE: what sets Gamma's scale (and thus the measurable signature) is deferred to Part 2. Premise supposed not asserted; gap is a contingent fact about reality, not verification work (explicitly NOT OPEN-CAVEATED)

claim: EXPLORATORY-CONJECTURE (PINNED) — Conjecture 2: metric engineering, the warp branch (Section 2 Part 2). IF a craft can locally restructure the spacetime metric so its motion is decoupled from the surrounding medium, THEN Track A's anomaly is explained directly: no relative motion through the air, so no bow shock / fireball / sonic boom / thermal load (it does not evade the Loeb-Kirkpatrick physics, it removes the relative velocity those signatures require). PREDICTED SIGNATURE (answers bridge C09): ANCHOR = background-light lensing at the bubble boundary (not parallax -> the clean discriminator a balloon-at-wrong-range cannot fake); plus gravitational clock-rate shift, local tidal/field gradient, and the documented absence of LK signatures. COST: requires negative energy density (Alcubierre magnitudes ~planet-to-star mass-energy, catastrophic); violates GR energy conditions. OPEN VULNERABILITY (the hinge): it over-predicts -- 'why so subtle?' -- an internal inconsistency left visible and unanswered. Gravitational-negation variant considered and dropped (no local GR knob; gravitational-shielding experiments null) -- metric-engineering branch only. Adjacent grey-lit cited as speculative NOT support: Alcubierre 1994; AAWSAP/DIRD. Premise supposed not asserted; gap is a contingent fact about reality, not verification work (explicitly NOT OPEN-CAVEATED)
source_pin: paper.html Section 2 Part 2 (PINNED); answers bridge C09; adjacent: Alcubierre 1994 (CQG 11 L73), AAWSAP/DIRD warp material

claim: EXPLORATORY-CONJECTURE (PINNED) — Predictive reach & boundary of Conjecture 2 (Section 2 Part 2 sub-entry). PREDICTIVE WIN: the warp premise (no relative motion through the medium) is medium-independent for fluids, so trans-medium air<->water transition without a splash falls out for free (no momentum transfer -> no splash) -- a necessary consequence, not an add-on. Predicts FORWARD: zero confirmed transmedium cases in the AARO data, so a prediction seeking evidence, not an explanation of established data. BOUNDARY (the finding): does NOT cleanly reach solid matter -- either (a) displace the solid like a fluid -> break/reform every lattice bond in the transit volume -> bore/heat/damage, contradicting intact passage; or (b) decouple from the solid entirely -> 'no interaction with matter', contradicting the craft's observed coupling to air and light (why lens light and ride the air-frame but ignore rock?). The conjecture naming where it breaks IS the result. Premise supposed not asserted; gap is a contingent fact, not verification work (explicitly NOT OPEN-CAVEATED)
source_pin: paper.html Section 2 Part 2 sub-entry (PINNED)

claim: EXPLORATORY-CONJECTURE (PINNED; MORE SPECULATIVE than the warp branch -- a pin within a pin) — Conjecture 3 (open thought): phasing / matter-decoupling, a SEPARATE mechanism, NOT an extension of Conjecture 2. IF some craft pass through solid matter intact, the warp branch cannot account for it; a distinct phasing/matter-decoupling mechanism would be required. Unknown whether such a mechanism is real. Filed separately on purpose: folding it into warp would make warp explain everything and predict nothing (the failure mode the format guards against). More speculative than warp: warp has Alcubierre as adjacent grey-lit; standalone phasing has even less -- a placeholder for a mechanism named, not built. claim: EXPLORATORY-CONJECTURE (PINNED) — Conjecture 3: wormhole / topological shortcut (Section 2 Part 3). Covers a DIFFERENT anomaly class than C2: discontinuous anomalies (apparent instantaneous relocation, 'here then there' jumps, right-angle turns implying the intervening space was never traversed). C2 (continuous) and C3 (discontinuous) are NOT redundant; a craft might use either or both. IF the craft can create and traverse a traversable wormhole (a topological connection between two separated regions), THEN it enters one mouth and emerges from the other without crossing the intervening space -- no relative velocity, no kinematic signature (warp's payoff by a topological rather than metric route). PREDICTED SIGNATURE (answers bridge C09 for the discontinuous class): (a) mouth lensing -- a wormhole mouth is extreme curvature -> intense local distortion; (b) appear/disappear. FINDING -- WEAKER DISCRIMINATOR: 'appears/disappears' is degenerate with a tracking dropout / sensor artifact (the mundane explanation Track A keeps invoking; it resolved GoFast), so C3 is HARDER to confirm than C2 -- the discontinuous-anomaly mechanism is intrinsically LESS falsifiable than the continuous one. COST: (1) traversable wormholes require negative energy density / exotic matter to hold the throat open -- same energy-condition violation as warp, no improvement; (2) throat stability against collapse is its own unsolved problem. OPEN VULNERABILITY: a wormhole connects to somewhere -- a paired second mouth is implied but not observed. Adjacent grey-lit cited speculative NOT support: Morris-Thorne 1988 (published GR, the real anchor); AAWSAP/DIRD. Premise supposed not asserted; gap is a contingent fact about reality, not verification work (explicitly NOT OPEN-CAVEATED)
source_pin: paper.html Section 2 Part 3 (PINNED); answers bridge C09 (discontinuous class); adjacent: Morris-Thorne 1988 (Am. J. Phys. 56 395), AAWSAP/DIRD

claim: EXPLORATORY-CONJECTURE (PINNED) — Portals as the observed mouths of existing mechanisms (Section 2 Part 4). NOT a new mechanism; parents C1 and C3. IF reported 'portals' (localized regions craft, and reportedly biological entities, traverse) are real, they are the observable mouth of an already-conjectured mechanism. Two candidates by where the far end connects: (a) a wormhole throat (C3) -> far end elsewhere in our own space (this is C3's missing second mouth); (b) the meta-structure boundary (C1) -> far end outside the bubble. DISCRIMINATOR (the finding): which mechanism a portal belongs to is distinguishable in principle by within-our-space (wormhole) vs outside-the-bubble (meta-structure) -- currently unmeasurable, but a real fork. MATTER-AGNOSTIC: a traversable connection is matter-indifferent, so the reported biological-entity traversal does not change the physics and is not over-weighted. OPEN SUB-PIN: a 'portal to a different dimension' is noted but under-specified until 'dimension' is made concrete (brane / compactified extra dimension). Premise supposed not asserted; gap is a contingent fact about reality, not verification work (explicitly NOT OPEN-CAVEATED)
source_pin: paper.html Section 2 Part 4 (PINNED); parent mechanisms C1 (Part 1) and C3 (Part 3)
